ORD ASGN DEPT 210/ROBERTSON FOR HRG. WIT S/E. DOC EVID INTRO JUDGMENT GRANTED PLAINTIFF P. PATEL, INDIV & DBA REGENCY HOTEL GROUP AGAINST DEFENDANT LITA BATO, INDIV & DBA EXPRESS GROCERY FOR $20,530.52 PLUS COSTS. LEASE FORFEITED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BATO, LITA IND&DBA EXPRES GROCERY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1224 POLK STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109 $20,530.52 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $20,530.52, LEASE FORFEITED
